entries.text: Did you hear that {table:gm/tavern/rumor-subject} {table:gm/tavern/rumor-root}? I could be wrong — I heard it from {table:gm/tavern/rumor-source}.

Did you hear that {table:gm/tavern/rumor-subject} {table:gm/tavern/rumor-action} and discovered {table:gm/tavern/rumor-discovery}, and now {table:gm/tavern/rumor-result}? I could be wrong — I heard it from {table:gm/tavern/rumor-source}.
